title: malva × columbretensis
intro: Malva × columbretensis, also known as the Maltese Mallow, is a hybrid plant species within the Malvaceae family, resulting from the cross between Malva moschata and Malva sylvestris. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Malva × columbretensis include soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Malva × columbretensis include teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water or mixing its roots with other herbs to create a topical treatment.
